creator: martin@email.aon.at
text:
I compiled a new kernel from the latest (a few hours ago) RELENG_7.
I also upgraded the ports to the latest version (again from a few
hours ago). Now the reboot does not occur any more.

So this seems to be limited to RELENG_7_1_0_RELEASE.

The only thing I still have to solve is how to stop the server from
freezing when the mouse is not moved (this problem seems to have
been reported by a lot of other people). Also, firefox3 does not
start... but I'll probably file another bug report for that.
